stop.title: Choose a Stop
stop.description: Search for the stop by the code printed on the pole or by name.

route.title: Choose a Route
route.description: Pick a route serving this stop, or 'All routes at this stop' to monitor every departure.

data.name: Sensor Name
data.direction_id: Direction (0 or 1, leave blank for both)

sensor_menu.title: Sensor Added
sensor_menu.description: The sensor was added. Add another sensor, or finish setup.

error.invalid_url: Please enter a valid URL including scheme (https://).
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the NTA feed.
error.cannot_parse: The feed responded but is not a GTFS-RT protobuf feed — remove any format=json parameter from the URL.
error.cannot_load_static_gtfs: Couldn't reach the static GTFS feed to load stops and routes — try again shortly.
error.route_list_not_narrowed: No routes found linked to this stop in the schedule — showing the full nationwide route list with operator shown instead.

data.name: Sensor Name
data.direction_id: Direction (0 or 1, leave blank for both)

sensor_menu.title: Sensor Added
sensor_menu.description: The sensor was added. Add another sensor, or save.

error.cannot_load_static_gtfs: Couldn't reach the static GTFS feed to load stops and routes — try again shortly.
error.route_list_not_narrowed: No routes found linked to this stop in the schedule — showing the full nationwide route list with operator shown instead.

unmatched_stop_route_pair.title: Sensor stop/route pair not found in the schedule
unmatched_stop_route_pair.description: Stop ID `{stop_id}` and route ID `{route_id}` never appear together in the static GTFS schedule, so the following sensor(s) will never report a departure: {sensor_names}. This usually means a stop_code or route_short_name (the numbers shown on the bus stop sign or in the TFI Live app) was entered instead of the real GTFS stop_id/route_id. Edit the affected sensor(s) to correct the value.

cannot_connect.message: Unable to reach the NTA GTFS-RT feed: {error}

cannot_parse.message: Failed to parse the GTFS-RT feed response: {error}
